executives.name: Diane Jurgens
executives.background: Diane Jurgens is an independent non-executive director. She was formerly the CTO of BHP and has held senior leadership roles at The Walt Disney Company and General Motors.

executives.name: Maria Ramos
executives.background: Maria Ramos is an independent non-executive director. She was formerly the CEO of Absa Group Limited and Director-General of the National Treasury of South Africa.
